heading: Counterintelligence and national security protections for intelligence community grant funding
label: 3061 Counterintelligence and national security protections for intelligence community grant funding

children.heading: Disclosure as condition for receipt of grant
children.label: a Disclosure as condition for receipt of grant
children.text: The head of an element of the intelligence community may not award a grant to a person or entity unless the person or entity has certified to the head of the element that the person or entity has disclosed to the head of the element any material financial or material in-kind support that the person or entity knows, or should have known, derives from the People’s Republic of China, the Russian Federation, the Islamic Republic of Iran, the Democratic People’s Republic of Korea, or the Republic of Cuba, during the 5-year period ending on the date of the person or entity’s application for the grant.

children.heading: Process for review of grant applicants prior to award
children.label: b Process for review of grant applicants prior to award

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: The head of an element of the intelligence community may not award a grant to a person or entity who submitted a certification under subsection (a) until such certification is received by the head of an element of the intelligence community and submitted to the Director of National Intelligence pursuant to the process set forth in paragraph (2).

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: The Director of National Intelligence, in coordination with such heads of elements of the intelligence community as the Director considers appropriate, shall establish a process to review the awarding of a grant to an applicant who submitted a certification under subsection (a).

children.label: i
children.text: The immediate transmission of a copy of each applicant’s certification made under subsection (a) to the Director of National Intelligence.

children.label: ii
children.text: The review of the certification and any accompanying disclosures submitted under subsection (a) as soon as practicable.

children.label: I
children.text: misappropriation of United States intellectual property, research and development, and innovation efforts; or
